---
title: "Webinare"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Online-Lernsessions von Branchenexperten"
description: "Nehmen Sie an kostenlosen Webinaren zu Cybersicherheit, Cloud Computing, KI, Softwareentwicklung und digitaler Transformation teil, geleitet von Branchenexperten."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Webinare</h1>
    <p>Kostenlose, von Experten geleitete Sessions zu Cybersicherheit, Cloud, KI und digitaler Transformation. Nehmen Sie von überall teil.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LANGUAGE NOTICE -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:16px; padding:2.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-translate" style="font-size:2rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Webinare auf Englisch & Rumänisch</h2>
      <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width:500px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem;">Unsere Webinare finden derzeit auf Englisch und Rumänisch statt. Entdecken Sie das vollständige Programm unten.</p>
      <a href="/academy/webinars.html" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Alle Webinare ansehen (EN)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING WEBINARS -->
<div class="m-s" id="upcoming" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Kommende Webinare</h2>
    <p class="sub">Klicken Sie für vollständige Informationen auf Englisch.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/zero-trust-security.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Zero Trust"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">90 Min.</div><h3>Zero Trust Security</h3><p>Prinzipien, Implementierungsstrategien und Fallstudien aus der Praxis.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/cloud-cost-optimization.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud Cost"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">60 Min.</div><h3>Cloud-Kostenoptimierung</h3><p>Verschwendung identifizieren, Governance implementieren und Cloud-ROI maximieren.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/ai-ethics-developers.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="AI Ethics"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">120 Min.</div><h3>KI-Ethik für Entwickler</h3><p>Verantwortungsvolle KI, Datenschutz, Fairness und Transparenz in der Praxis.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/cyber-awareness.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Cyber Awareness"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">90 Min.</div><h3>Cyber Awareness</h3><p>Modernes Security-Awareness-Training mit KnowBe4.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/webinars/pages/digital-transformation.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Digital Transformation"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">75 Min.</div><h3>Digitale Transformation</h3><p>Framework für die Führung technologischen Wandels in Ihrer Organisation.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECURRING SERIES -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Wiederkehrende Reihen</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regelmäßige Sessions, auf die Sie zählen können.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Security First</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Monatliche Vertiefungen in Cybersicherheitspraktiken, Threat Intelligence und Sicherheitsarchitektur. Erster Dienstag, 60 Min.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Monatlich</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-cloud-arrow-up" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Cloud Mastery</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Cloud-Technologien, Architekturmuster und operative Best Practices über alle großen Plattformen. Monatlich, 90 Min.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Monatlich</div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-heart-pulse" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4><span style="color:#fff;">Cyberhygiene</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Wöchentliche Sessions zu Verfahren, Frameworks und Cybersicherheitsmethoden. Jeden Mittwoch, 60 Min.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="up-badge up-badge-open">Wöchentlich</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST WEBINARS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Vergangene Webinare</h2>
    <p class="sub">Aufzeichnungen für registrierte Teilnehmer verfügbar.</p>
    <div class="row g-4" style="max-width:900px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Cyber Awareness">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-collection-play me-1"></i> Aufzeichnung verfügbar</div>
            <h3>Cyber Awareness Best Practices</h3>
            <p style="font-size:0.82rem;">Mit Chenist, KnowBe4 und dem rumänischen Cybersicherheitsamt (DNSC).</p>
            <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);"><i class="bi bi-calendar3" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> März 2025</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <div class="pg-card">
          <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Data Privacy">
          <div class="pg-card-body">
            <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#81BD4A; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;"><i class="bi bi-collection-play me-1"></i> Aufzeichnung verfügbar</div>
            <h3>Datenschutz-Compliance</h3>
            <p style="font-size:0.82rem;">Globale Datenschutzvorschriften und praktische Compliance-Ansätze.</p>
            <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);"><i class="bi bi-calendar3" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Februar 2025</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Möchten Sie in Ihrer Organisation organisieren?</h2>
    <p>Werden Sie Partner unserer Academy und organisieren Sie Webinare, Workshops oder Schulungen für Ihr Team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/de/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-handshake me-2"></i>Partner werden</a>
      <a href="/de/academy/partnerships.html" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Mehr über Partnerschaften</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
